topbar.auto_sync_help_on: BizTrack will sync in the background when your connection is good enough.
topbar.auto_sync_help_off: Changes stay local until you sync manually or turn auto-sync back on.
topbar.auto_sync_warning: Auto-sync is off on this device. If you use more than one device, recent changes may not stay up to date until you sync manually.
topbar.settings_description: These preferences are stored only on this device.
topbar.min_quality_help: Background sync starts once this device reaches {quality} connection quality.
topbar.min_quality_disabled: Turn auto-sync back on to choose when background sync starts.
topbar.desktop_only_subtitle: Sync preferences are available in the installed desktop app.

sell.title: Sell
sell.subtitle: Sales screen - coming soon.
sell.search_placeholder: Search product name or scan barcode…
sell.barcode_not_found_description: No product uses this barcode yet.
sell.empty_cart_hint: Tap a product on the left to start a sale
sell.customer_dialog_desc: Assign this sale to a customer to track receipts and credit.
sell.card_hint: Process payment on your bank terminal, then confirm below.
sell.scan_hint: Scan or type a barcode here, then press Enter.
sell.catalogue_subtitle: Search the local catalog and ring up a sale without waiting on the API.
sell.payment_saved_hint: The sale is saved locally and stock has been updated on this device.
sell.receipt_print_unavailable: Thermal printing is only available in the desktop app. Receipt PDF downloaded instead.
sell.receipt_share_unavailable: Sharing files is not available here. Receipt PDF downloaded instead.
sell.receipt_share_failed: Could not share the PDF. Receipt PDF downloaded instead.
sell.receipt_share_saved: Sharing is not available here. Receipt PDF saved to Downloads.
sell.business_required: Select a business on this device before opening the sell screen.
sell.load_error: Unable to load the sell workspace.

errors.SALE_EMPTY: Add at least one item before confirming the sale.
errors.SALE_QUANTITY_INVALID: Each cart line needs a valid quantity.
errors.SALE_UNIT_PRICE_INVALID: A cart line has an invalid unit price.
errors.SALE_DISCOUNT_INVALID: Discount must be zero or greater.
errors.SALE_UNDERPAID: Amount paid must cover the total due.
errors.SALE_PRODUCT_NOT_FOUND: One of the products in the cart is no longer available locally.
errors.SALE_PRODUCT_INACTIVE: A product in the cart is inactive and cannot be sold.
errors.SALE_INSUFFICIENT_STOCK: There is not enough stock to complete this sale.

products.title: Product catalog
products.subtitle: Create products, review your catalog, and keep an eye on items that are running low.

metrics.total_products_hint: Active and inactive products in your catalog.
metrics.low_stock_hint: Products currently at or below their threshold.
metrics.categories_hint: Available catalog groupings for this business.
metrics.units_hint: System and custom units of measure.

list.title: All products
list.description: Filter the full catalog in a table, then open any product for details.

recent.title: Recent products
recent.description: The five most recently updated products across this business.
recent.cta_description: Open the full table view for filters, pagination, and faster product lookup.
recent.empty_description: Add your first product to start building the catalog for this business.

filters.search_placeholder: Search by name, SKU, or barcode

empty.title: No products found
empty.description: Try a different filter or open Add product to create your first catalog item.

form.title: Add a product
form.description: Start with the essentials. You can refine pricing, media, and stock rules later.
form.update_description: Adjust the catalog details for this product without leaving the workspace.

placeholders.description: Optional selling note or internal reminder
placeholders.sku: Leave blank to generate one automatically
placeholders.barcode: Optional. Must be a valid barcode if provided

tooltips.track_inventory: Enable this for physical goods so BizTrack can monitor stock levels, low-stock thresholds, and restocks.

low_stock.title: Attention needed
low_stock.description: Quick view of the products already below their configured threshold.

detail.title: Product details
detail.no_description: No description added for this product yet.
detail.not_found_description: BizTrack could not find that product in the local catalog for this business.
detail.overview_description: Core product details used by the team during sales and catalog review.
detail.inventory_description: Tracking and identification details for this product.
detail.movements_description: Recent stock movements and inventory adjustments for this product.
detail.inventory_disabled_description: Enable inventory tracking from product settings if this item should participate in stock monitoring.
detail.delete_confirm: Delete this product from the local catalog?

categories_page.title: Categories
categories_page.description: Review how products are grouped across the catalog.
categories_page.empty_description: Categories will appear here once they are available in this business.

metrics.total_hint: Catalog groupings available to this business.
metrics.assigned_hint: Products currently linked to a category.
metrics.uncategorized_hint: Products that still need a category.

categories_page.delete_confirm: Delete this category? This cannot be undone. Contact a super admin if you need help restoring it.
categories_page.delete_confirm_super_admin: Delete this category? This cannot be undone from the list, but you can undo it right after deletion.
categories_page.create_description: Add a category with an optional color, icon, image, and sort order.
categories_page.update_description: Edit this category without leaving the products workspace.

units_page.title: Units of measure
units_page.description: Review the measurement options available while creating and editing products.
units_page.search_placeholder: Search by unit name or abbreviation
units_page.empty_description: Units of measure will appear here once BizTrack loads them for this business.

metrics.total_hint: System and business-specific units currently available.
metrics.defaults_hint: Units marked as defaults in the local catalog.
metrics.in_use_hint: Units already assigned to one or more products.

units_page.delete_confirm: Delete this unit of measure? This cannot be undone. Contact a super admin if you need help restoring it.
units_page.delete_confirm_super_admin: Delete this unit of measure? This cannot be undone from the list, but you can undo it right after deletion.
units_page.create_description: Create a custom unit with a name, abbreviation, and type.
units_page.update_description: Edit this custom unit without leaving the products workspace.

errors.deactivate: Unable to mark the product inactive.

errors.image_url_too_long: Image URL must be 500 characters or fewer.
errors.reload_after_create: The product was saved locally, but BizTrack could not reload it afterwards.

errors.category_not_found: BizTrack could not find that category in the local catalog.
errors.category_name_required: Enter a category name before saving.
errors.category_name_too_long: Category name must be 100 characters or fewer.
errors.category_name_in_use: A category with this name already exists in this business.

errors.category_image_url_too_long: Image URL must be 500 characters or fewer.
errors.category_sort_order_invalid: Sort order must be a whole number that is zero or greater.
errors.category_has_products: This category cannot be deleted because products are still assigned to it.
errors.category_save_reload_failed: The category was saved locally, but BizTrack could not reload it afterwards.

errors.unit_name_too_long: Unit name must be 50 characters or fewer.
errors.unit_name_in_use: A unit with this name already exists in this business.
errors.unit_abbreviation_required: Enter a unit abbreviation before saving.
errors.unit_abbreviation_too_long: Unit abbreviation must be 10 characters or fewer.
errors.unit_system_immutable: System and default units cannot be changed or deleted.
errors.unit_has_products: This unit cannot be deleted because products are still using it.
errors.unit_save_reload_failed: The unit was saved locally, but BizTrack could not reload it afterwards.

alerts.title: Low-stock alerts
alerts.description: Most urgent stock issues across the business.

filters.search_placeholder: Search by name, SKU or barcode…

stock.title: Stock levels
stock.description: Review current quantities and open a product to manage thresholds or movements.
stock.empty_description: Inventory only appears for products with tracking enabled.
stock.empty_filtered: No products match the current filters.

detail.empty_description: Choose an inventory row to review movements and make stock changes.
detail.all_movements_description: Review the full stock movement history for this product.

thresholds.title: Stock thresholds
thresholds.description: Define low-stock and reorder thresholds for a product. Leave blank to remove a threshold.

adjustment.description: Add, remove, or set an exact quantity for a product. A note is required for audit purposes.
adjustment.title: Adjust stock

restock.title: Record restock
restock.description: Log an incoming stock delivery. Unit cost and supplier details are optional but recommended.
restock.notes_placeholder: Optional delivery notes, batch info, or supplier comments.
restock.no_products_selected: Choose the purchased products and quantities in a dedicated picker.
restock.select_products_description: Build the list of purchased products, then confirm to return to the restock form.
restock.attach_invoice_hint: PDF, JPG or PNG - drag and drop or click to browse.
restock.product_already_added: This product is already in the restock list.
restock.replace_existing_confirm: {product} is already in the restock list. Select OK to replace the existing line, or Cancel to keep it.
restock.empty_items: Add a product above to start the restock list.

movement_log.title: Recent stock movements
movement_log.description: Latest stock changes across the business.
movement_log.empty: No stock movements have been recorded yet.

errors.reorder_point_invalid: Reorder point must be a valid non-negative number.
errors.adjustment_quantity_invalid: Adjustment quantity must be a valid number greater than zero.
errors.adjustment_notes_required: Please provide a reason for this adjustment (at least 3 characters).
errors.insufficient_stock: Insufficient stock to complete this removal.
errors.restock_unit_cost_invalid: Unit cost must be a valid non-negative number.
errors.restock_total_cost_invalid: Total cost could not be calculated. Check unit cost and quantity.

errors.inventory_not_found: Tracked inventory was not found for this product.
errors.restock_items_required: Add at least one restock item before saving.
errors.restock_quantity_invalid: Restock quantity must be at least 0.001.
errors.adjustment_validation: Enter a quantity and notes before applying an adjustment.
